heading: Judicial Conference of the Court of International Trade
label: 335 Judicial Conference of the Court of International Trade
notes: Effective DateSection effective 60 days after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1986 Amendment note under .Oct. 14, 1986section 4 of Pub. L. 99–466section 331 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective 60 days after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1986 Amendment note under .Oct. 14, 1986section 4 of Pub. L. 99–466section 331 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: The chief judge of the Court of International Trade is authorized to summon annually the judges of such court to a judicial conference, at a time and place that such chief judge designates, for the purpose of considering the business of such court and improvements in the administration of justice in such court.

children.label: b
children.text: The Court of International Trade shall provide by its rules for representation and active participation at such conference by members of the bar.
